user_goal: Execute and supervise three architecture branches, integrate accepted public-safe work, validate, push once, then review post-Git external-action planning gates.
rag_queries: What earlier watchdog work is accepted, partial, or blocked?
What public evidence supports current runtime and provider claims?
What artifacts are missing for the PRD/ICP delivery and content architectures?
facts: The public repository baseline is main at commit d889d84 before current uncommitted continuation-packet corrections.
The prior July 10 integration added conservative runtime-gate and content-operation improvements but did not execute the corrected three-branch loop.
Separate specialist thread and worktree tools are available.
Notion, Linear, Railway, provider activation, deployment, and social publication were blocked in the prior review.
interpretations: Role contracts should govern orchestration; compatible runtimes may fulfill watchdog, executor, verifier, safety-reviewer, integrator, or external-action roles.
Existing runtime evidence is historical unless revalidated during this run.
hypotheses: Three disjoint branch scopes can produce mergeable documentation and configuration improvements without unsafe external side effects.
gaps: Current hosted runtime freshness is unverified.
Notion connector schema and target mapping are unverified.
No current buyer, demand, ROI, or paid-client proof exists.
forbidden_actions: mutate external systems before the required Git sequence
make unsupported runtime, demand, ROI, customer, or SaaS-readiness claims
role_assignment: Branch A Terra Supervisor with Luna Planner, Executor, Verifier, Safety Reviewer, and Reporter
Branch B Terra Supervisor with Luna Planner, Executor, Verifier, Safety Reviewer, and Reporter
Branch C Terra Supervisor with Luna Planner, Executor, Verifier, Safety Reviewer, and Reporter
acceptance_criteria: All three branch chats return evidence-backed merge recommendations.
Accepted branch work is reviewed and integrated before one validation and push sequence.
Post-Git Notion planning is reviewed before any possible mutation.
The final handout records completed, partial, blocked, and approval-gated states.
evidence_required: branch file lists and diff summaries
Git commit and push evidence or exact blocker
stop_conditions: private data would enter a public file
an external target, schema, budget, rollback path, or approval is ambiguous
a branch lacks evidence after one repair request
